threshold_count: How many labeled marks have value {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Count the labeled marks with values {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
Determine how many marks show values strictly {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
What number of labeled marks have values {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Find how many labeled marks are {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
in_interval: How many labeled marks have value in the inclusive interval [{interval_min}, {interval_max}]?
Count the labeled marks whose values fall in [{interval_min}, {interval_max}], inclusive.
Determine how many marks have values between {interval_min} and {interval_max}, inclusive.
What number of labeled marks lie in the inclusive interval [{interval_min}, {interval_max}]?
Find how many labeled marks have values from {interval_min} to {interval_max}, inclusive.
above_threshold_count: How many labeled marks have value {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Count the labeled marks with values {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
Determine how many marks show values strictly {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
What number of labeled marks have values {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Find how many labeled marks are {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
below_threshold_count: How many labeled marks have value {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Count the labeled marks with values {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
Determine how many marks show values strictly {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
What number of labeled marks have values {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Find how many labeled marks are {threshold_comparison_phrase} {threshold}.

global.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.

query:above_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:above_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on every mark whose value is strictly greater than the threshold

query:below_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:below_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on every mark whose value is strictly less than the threshold

query:in_interval.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:in_interval.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on every mark whose value is inside the inclusive interval
